creator: chalpin@cs.wisc.edu
text:
You appear to be using /dev/cd0 when the correct device is /dev/pass0.

   The error given by dvdisaster is entirely correct.

   The correct device to use under FreeBSD is mentioned in the dvdisaster 
documentation installed at:
   /usr/local/doc/dvdisaster-0.72/en/qa20.html

   Or online here:
   http://dvdisaster.net/en/qa20.html

   When run without arguments, the dvdisaster window displays the correct 
device files for all the devices it can use.

~crh
